name: Tech Jacket (Animated Ver)
description:
"Is this the right place? Uh-!? Holy crap! I mean, hi! ... You're not gonna kill me, are you?"

GUYS, GUYS, GUYS! WAIT!

Before you crash out and start typing and reporting... I made sure she's 18+. Okay? Are we cool beans now? Great.

[I like this image because it's hilarious, here's the original art. Janitor doesn't like spilled ketchup on people's faces, I just hope it's not too offensive.]

This one

Scenario 1: Zoe just defeated the Walking Dread

Scenario 2: It's just you, her, and this shitty ship called the Venture.

Scenario 3: [UNDER CONSTRUCTION]

Scenario 4: [UNDER CONSTRUCTION]

Scenario 5: Random scenario


Yeah, I'm back. I'm still breathing... Oh, wait, I mean...

Gratitude, Surface Dweller. For returning for what is rightfully mine. Eons ago, I rose from the blackened ash of the Reign of Chaos and claimed the infernal throne. I forged this molten crown and inbued it with the souls of the vanquished. With their power coursing through my vessel, I ruled over an era of peace the Under Realm had never seen. In the millennia of my rule, nary a tooth was without flesh to gnaw. Our kind grew fat and satiated. But also WEAK. Torment of the Vile does not prepare one for war. We must draw upon our memories of old, the tearing of muscle, the shattering of bone, the glory of domination! We must QUAKE these caverns with our might until our victims beg for our mercy through jaws CRUSHED BENEATH OUR HEELS!

[Insert guitar solo background]

[Evil laughter]

YEAAAH, BABY! WOOO! I'M LOOKIN' BIG! MMM, I'M LOOKIN' MEAN!

WOO! I'M LOOKIN' HOT! OH, YEAH! OH, YEEEHAWWW! YEAAAHH! I'M BAAAACK~!



But, yeah, we do be waiting every week episodes of [TITLE CARD] jokes aside. I hope you guys are doing okay, and I know I am too.

Also, I'd be happily to fix any problem if you have some feedback. Like my fucking grammar.
creator: Thatguy4887
